titleStmt.title: SII 26.534: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 534. (A.R. No. 504B of 1909.) PUDUPĀḶAIYAM, SRIVILLIPUTTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.
It is another copy of the same inscription dealt with under No. 532 above, but this is signed by several officials and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu nāḷ Antarāyamuṭpaṭa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikkum Iṟaikaṭṭiṉamaikku
kuṭināṭṭuk karuṅkuḷamāṉa cātavācakaṉallūṟ tevaṉ paracirāmaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyateva nāṭṭu Irācavallapurattu Oruvāṟuṉantāṉ Eṉak
tamiḻppallavaraiyaṉ perāl Iccātavācakanallūr pā ṅkāṟṟiccuramuṭaiyār kiḻaittiruvācalukkut teṉkiḻaikkākac ceyvitta Eṉakku nal
ttikkun tiruvārūr kṣaṇa koḷaki maṭattu Ācāriyar śiṣyaril Īcāṉa tevaṟkum Ivar san=tāṉattut tapasyaṟkum bhojaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku 10 1 vatiṉeti
yum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum kaṟpūravilaiyum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupilicantuvikkirakappeṟum tiruvācaṟpeṟum tiruvilaicciṉaippeṟum poṉ
paṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa maṭappuṟa yiṟaiyiliyāyiruppatākavum pāṇṭiyatevaṉukkuc cātavācakanallūr melpāl karuṅkuḷattil kāṇiyāṉa muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nāccāṉ vayakka
ṉ kiḻakkuttaṭi 10 5tmaś nna7kū ḥ Itaṉ vaṭakkuttaṭi 4 10 5m�ḥ Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟut taṭi ka 5 m �m ciṅkaḷa vayakkal taṭi tma � nna 7 tma ḥm Āka nya nna � m Ivvūr vaṭapāl Ātiyūr
ṟuttevaṉ vayakkal taṭi 1 rūpāy Þ Þ na 100 tma ḥm muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu yātavarāyaṉ ceykku vaṭakiḻakkut taṭi 2 rūpāy ma Þ na �m Itaṉ teṉmeṟkut taṭi 2 rūpāy m m Þ na m �-ḥ Itaṉ vaṭakiḻa
vākkālukkut teṟkuttaṭi 1 rūpāy � Þ na �ḥm Āka rūpāy � ḥm Ivvūr melpāl putukkuḷattu mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṉaiyāṇṭāṉ taṭikkut teṉkiḻakkuk karu
kkuk kiḻakkuc cemmoṭi vākkālukku meṟkut taṭi pala rūpāy ç tma � ḥm Āka rūpāy (1/2)m kaṟkayattuppaṟṟil Āṟṟukkut teṟkut toṭṭa rūpāy § Þm Āka rūpāy (1/2) § Þ nilam Araiye Ira
l maṭappuṟa yiṟaiyiliyāyiṟuppatākavum Iṟukkumiṭattu Antarāyamum viṉiyokamuṅ kaṟpūravilaiyum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum tiru
ṉaippeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa māttāl kācu (1/4)m payir pārttu viḷainta nilattukkuk kaṭamai māttāl Ivvūṟ kaṭamai Iṟukkuṅ kālāl ḷa ka
Ivvaricaiyāl Oṉṟu mukkālum Aṟpacik kuṟuvai viḷainta rūpāy kku Oṉṟupātiyum tulāviṟaittu viḷainta rūpāy kku Oṉṟukālum Eḷ varaku tiṉaippulliṟuṅkum viḷainta rūpāy kku mal¬2m
patāka Iṟai kaṭṭiṉamaikku Ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam vaṭavallattirukkai Iḷāṉ kuṭiyāṉa Intirāvatāranallūr catiraṉ tiruvaṉai Āṭaittāṉāṉa villavataraiyaṉ E
ḷanāyakam miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟ kūṟṟu ciparāntakanallūr vāṇiyaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa kacciyarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai puravaritiṉaikkaḷanāyakam miḻalaik kūṟṟattu
Ē poṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam koḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu veḷiyāṟṟūrāṉa koccikāmaṇinallūr
yeṉeḻuttu Ivai vaṭatalaic cempināṭṭu nallūrkkuṭi ṭaiyāṉ Amara puyaṅkaraṉ Iruṇīkkiṉāṉ pottappic coḻaṉeḻuttu Ivai puravarit tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam vaṭatalai ṟṟāṉ cu
kūṟṟaṅkuṭaiyāṉ cīrāḷaṉa paṭayāṉāṉa paḻantiparāmaṉeḻuttu Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟut taccaṉūruṭaiyāṉ cevakattevaṉāṉa vāṇādhirājaṉeḻuttu Ivai vaṭatalai
yāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiyanallūrc civalavaṉ Eṟutiruvuṭaiyāṉāṉa kāliṅkarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai muttūṟṟukkūṟṟattu kappalūrāṉa Ulakaḷantacolanallūrk kuppai Aḻakaṉāṉa muṉai
mu nāṭṭu rājavallapurattu Oruvāṟuṇarntāṉ Eṉakkunallaperumāḷāṉa tamiḻppallavaraiyaṉeḻuttu Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟṟu vāvilimaṅkalattup paṉaiyūru�
ṉa ceyatirājaṉeḻuttu Ivai muttūṟṟuk kūṟṟattu Antaṉūṟ civampūṟuṭaiyāṉ vānattam perunteyvam teyvapperumāḷāṉa vattarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai puravaritiṇaik
ṟṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟṟuc ciparāntakanallūrp putukkuṭaiyāṉ colaiyūr cuntararā ṉāṉa paḻantiparājaṉeḻuttu Ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam miḻalai
turuṭaiyāṉa Araiyaṉ Akkākoṉāṉa ttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.534 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
